principles: Use the GCA/USDT pool as the single public market route.
Improve market quality through transparent liquidity, useful product delivery, and legitimate public participation.
Disclose starter-depth liquidity, owner reserve custody, external review status, and third-party audit status plainly.
Do not use artificial activity, self-trading, wash trading, misleading volume, or paid listing promises as a trust strategy.

legitimateActions.label: Keep public metadata consistent
actions: Keep website, verify page, token list, well-known identity, listing kit, market page, and readiness pages aligned.
Keep all public routes pointed to the GCA/USDT pool.
Do not promote the old GCA/WETH pilot pool as the current market route.

legitimateActions.label: Deepen liquidity transparently
actions: Add liquidity only when the owner intentionally funds both sides of the pool.
Record pool, position, and transaction details before presenting the change publicly.
Continue to warn that starter-depth or early liquidity can have high price impact and slippage.

legitimateActions.label: Deliver usable utility
actions: Connect the GCA member and 100-credit workflows to controlled HTTPS account UI.
Keep holder credits scoped to reports, backtests, risk warnings, ENTRY_READY review, calculators, or education access.
Do not describe credits or member status as cash, tokens, income, reimbursement, or trading permission.

legitimateActions.label: Build public trust
actions: Keep Telegram, X, website, whitepaper, logo, and public disclosures live.
Publish conservative updates when BaseScan, Blockaid, wallet, or data platform status changes.
Answer common pool, reserve, and wallet-warning questions with official links.

legitimateActions.label: Prepare for platform review
actions: Wait for BaseScan token profile publication before tracked listing outreach.
Wait for stronger legitimate public activity and exchange volume before CoinGecko or CoinMarketCap submission.
Use the listing readiness page before any external listing or exchange outreach.

doNotUse: paid services claiming certain exchange or data-platform listing
claims of mature liquidity before market data supports it
claims of external audit completion before an independent report is published
watchMetrics: BaseScan, Blockaid, wallet, and data platform review status
nextActions: Publish any future liquidity changes with exact pool and transaction references.
Connect controlled HTTPS account UI for member and credit workflows.
Wait for stronger legitimate activity before CoinGecko or CoinMarketCap submission.
Revisit third-party audit only when trust, partner, listing, or liquidity requirements justify it.
